fa-face-weary.appearanceId: round face with wide open eyes showing strain lines above, deeply furrowed brow, and open grimacing mouth with downturned corners

fa-face-woozy.appearanceId: round face with one eye open and one eye as a spiral, raised eyebrow, and wavy uneven mouth

fa-face-worried.appearanceId: round face with raised arched eyebrows, wide open eyes, and small downturned frown
fa-face-worried.intentId: convey worry or apprehension about something

fa-face-zany.appearanceId: round face with one eye wide open, one eye closed in wink, stuck-out tongue, and raised eyebrow

fa-face-zipper.appearanceId: round face with normal eyes and a zipper pull replacing the mouth in a closed horizontal line
fa-face-zipper.intentId: convey keeping a secret or staying quiet

fa-feather.appearanceId: single quill feather with pointed tip and barbs along central shaft

fa-feather-alt.appearanceId: quill feather with pointed tip, barbs along shaft, and a thin nib line at the base
fa-feather-alt.functionalityId: compose or sign with a quill pen
fa-feather-alt.intentId: write, sign, or author a document

fa-ferry.appearanceId: side-view ferry boat with flat deck, enclosed cabin structure, and wide hull
fa-ferry.functionalityId: find or schedule a ferry transit route
fa-ferry.intentId: access water-based transit or crossing service

fa-field-hockey.appearanceId: curved-tip field hockey stick with a small ball near the hooked end
fa-field-hockey.functionalityId: browse or tag field hockey content

fa-file.appearanceId: single document page with folded top-right corner

fa-file-alt.appearanceId: document page with folded top-right corner and horizontal text lines on the body
fa-file-alt.functionalityId: open or view a text document
fa-file-alt.intentId: read or edit a text-based file

fa-file-audio.appearanceId: document page with folded corner and a musical note symbol on the body
fa-file-audio.functionalityId: open or play an audio file
fa-file-audio.intentId: access or preview an audio document

fa-file-award.appearanceId: document page with folded corner and a circular medallion with ribbon badge on the body
fa-file-award.functionalityId: view or issue an award certificate
fa-file-award.intentId: access a certificate or credential document

fa-file-binary.appearanceId: document page with folded corner and binary digits 0 and 1 on the body
fa-file-binary.functionalityId: open or inspect a binary data file
fa-file-binary.intentId: access raw binary or machine-code content

fa-file-cad.appearanceId: document page with CAD label badge
fa-file-cad.functionalityId: open or export a CAD drawing file

fa-file-caret-down.appearanceId: document page with folded corner and a downward-pointing caret arrow on the body
fa-file-caret-down.functionalityId: download or expand a file downward
fa-file-caret-down.intentId: retrieve or open a file from below

fa-file-caret-up.appearanceId: document page with folded corner and an upward-pointing caret arrow on the body
fa-file-caret-up.functionalityId: upload or promote a file upward
fa-file-caret-up.intentId: send or submit a file to a higher destination

fa-file-chart-line.appearanceId: document page with folded corner and an upward-trending line chart on the body
fa-file-chart-line.functionalityId: open or view a data report file
fa-file-chart-line.intentId: access trend or analytics report document

fa-file-chart-pie.appearanceId: document page with folded corner and a pie chart divided into wedges on the body
fa-file-chart-pie.functionalityId: open or view a pie chart report file
fa-file-chart-pie.intentId: access a proportion or breakdown report

fa-file-check.appearanceId: document page with folded corner and a checkmark on the body
fa-file-check.functionalityId: mark a file as reviewed or approved
fa-file-check.intentId: confirm a document is complete or verified

fa-file-circle-check.appearanceId: document page with circle-check badge at corner
fa-file-circle-check.intentId: mark a document as verified or complete

fa-file-circle-exclamation.appearanceId: document page with circle-exclamation badge at corner
fa-file-circle-exclamation.functionalityId: flag a file with a warning alert
fa-file-circle-exclamation.intentId: draw attention to a problematic document

fa-file-circle-info.appearanceId: document page with circle-info badge at corner
fa-file-circle-info.functionalityId: view information or metadata about a file
fa-file-circle-info.intentId: learn more about a document's details

fa-file-circle-minus.appearanceId: document page with circle-minus badge at corner
fa-file-circle-minus.functionalityId: remove or reduce content from a file
fa-file-circle-minus.intentId: delete or subtract from a document

fa-file-circle-plus.appearanceId: document page with circle-plus badge at corner
fa-file-circle-plus.functionalityId: add a new file or attachment
fa-file-circle-plus.intentId: create or append a new document

fa-file-circle-question.appearanceId: document page with circle-question badge at corner
fa-file-circle-question.functionalityId: get help or clarification about a file
fa-file-circle-question.intentId: investigate an unknown or unclear document

fa-file-circle-xmark.appearanceId: document page with circle-xmark badge at corner

fa-file-code.appearanceId: document page with angle-bracket code symbols
fa-file-code.functionalityId: open or edit a source code file
fa-file-code.intentId: access a code or script document

fa-file-contract.appearanceId: document page with folded corner and horizontal text lines plus a signature line at the bottom
fa-file-contract.functionalityId: open or sign a contract document
fa-file-contract.intentId: review or execute a legal agreement

fa-file-csv.appearanceId: document page with CSV label badge
fa-file-csv.functionalityId: open or export a CSV data file

fa-file-doc.appearanceId: document page with DOC label badge
fa-file-doc.functionalityId: open or edit a Word-format document
fa-file-doc.intentId: access a word processing document file

fa-file-download.appearanceId: document page with folded corner and a downward arrow on the body
fa-file-download.functionalityId: download a file to local storage
fa-file-download.intentId: save a document to the device

fa-file-eps.appearanceId: document page with EPS label badge
fa-file-eps.functionalityId: open or export an EPS vector file

fa-file-excel.appearanceId: document page with Excel spreadsheet grid badge
fa-file-excel.functionalityId: open or edit a spreadsheet file
fa-file-excel.intentId: access tabular or financial data in Excel

fa-file-exclamation.appearanceId: document page with folded corner and an exclamation mark on the body
fa-file-exclamation.functionalityId: flag a file with a warning or alert
fa-file-exclamation.intentId: highlight a critical or urgent document

fa-file-export.appearanceId: document page with folded corner and a rightward arrow exiting the body
fa-file-export.functionalityId: export a file to another location or format
fa-file-export.intentId: send or share a document externally

fa-file-fragment.appearanceId: document page outline with jagged or fragmented torn edge on one side
fa-file-fragment.functionalityId: indicate an incomplete or partial file
fa-file-fragment.intentId: access a fragment or broken piece of a document

fa-file-gif.appearanceId: document page with GIF label badge
fa-file-gif.functionalityId: open or insert a GIF animation file

fa-file-half-dashed.appearanceId: document page outline with dashed lower half
fa-file-half-dashed.functionalityId: indicate a partially complete or draft file
fa-file-half-dashed.intentId: access an in-progress or unfinished document

fa-file-heart.appearanceId: document page with folded corner and a heart shape on the body
fa-file-heart.intentId: save a document to favorites or wish list

fa-file-image.appearanceId: document page with mountain-and-sun landscape thumbnail
fa-file-image.functionalityId: open or preview an image file
fa-file-image.intentId: access a photo or graphic document

fa-file-import.appearanceId: document page with folded corner and a leftward arrow entering the body
fa-file-import.functionalityId: import a file from an external source
fa-file-import.intentId: bring in a document from another location

fa-file-invoice.appearanceId: document page with folded corner and horizontal lines plus a small table or grid on the body
fa-file-invoice.functionalityId: open or create an invoice document
fa-file-invoice.intentId: review or send a billing statement

fa-file-invoice-dollar.appearanceId: document page with folded corner, horizontal text lines, and a dollar sign on the body
fa-file-invoice-dollar.functionalityId: open or create a dollar-value invoice
fa-file-invoice-dollar.intentId: review or issue a financial billing document

fa-file-jpg.appearanceId: document page with JPG label badge
fa-file-jpg.functionalityId: open or save a JPEG image file
fa-file-jpg.intentId: access a compressed photo or image document

fa-file-lock.appearanceId: document page with folded corner and a padlock symbol on the body
fa-file-lock.functionalityId: lock or restrict access to a file
fa-file-lock.intentId: protect a document from editing or viewing

fa-file-medical.appearanceId: document page with folded corner and a plus cross medical symbol on the body
fa-file-medical.functionalityId: open or manage a medical record file

fa-file-minus.appearanceId: document page with folded corner and a horizontal minus bar on the body
fa-file-minus.functionalityId: remove content or reduce a file
